ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "avg_volume" INTEGER /* Average trading volume */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the exchange information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., USA, Europe) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the market information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous close */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous close */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the price information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange info record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock exchange information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_info_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_info_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_info_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the news article information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* User's note about the stock in the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the watchlist information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
